hermes.title: COO
hermes.description: The CEO's sole point of contact. Coordinates all departments.

voss.title: HR Director
voss.description: Recruits and creates agents on demand.

athena.title: Intelligence Director
athena.description: Research and analysis. Spawns research workers.

hephaestus.title: Build Director
hephaestus.description: Code construction. Spawns build workers. DELEGATES, never codes.

minos.title: Quality Director
minos.description: Testing and review. Spawns quality workers. DELEGATES, never tests.

daedalus.title: Meta Engineering Director
daedalus.description: Enforces the 6 Laws. Revokes tools from misbehaving WebForge agents. Can ONLY affect WebForge agents — never OpenCode built-in agents.
